title: Secure HTTP request redirections
description: HTTP redirections that use unvalidated user input can be exploited for open redirect attacks, where attackers can redirect users to malicious websites while appearing to come from a trusted source.
recommendation: Validate redirect URLs against a whitelist of allowed destinations or use relative URLs.

noncompliant.description: Unvalidated redirects allow attackers to redirect users to malicious sites.

compliant.description: Validate redirect URLs against whitelists or use relative URLs.
